title: Prior passport corroboration review
text: Prior SDN review on Jane Citizen highlighted passport corroboration and exact normalized name match as key escalation evidence.

title: Escalation guidance for strong corroborated matches
text: Escalate when exact identifier and date-of-birth corroboration support a strong onboarding watchlist match.

title: Organization corroboration guidance
text: Escalate when organization registration identifiers and name normalization support the same legal entity.

title: Organization name-overlap false positive
text: Analyst review found that similar organization names without matching registration numbers or country support should not be auto-confirmed.

title: ACH sparse-data caution
text: ACH alerts with sparse party data and weak name overlap should be investigated rather than treated as confirmed matches.

title: ACH corroborated identity escalation
text: Escalate ACH alerts when exact identifier and date-of-birth corroboration support a strong party match.

title: Name-only OFAC false positive
text: A prior OFAC-inspired review showed that Tareck name overlap without supporting DOB, geography, or identifiers should remain an investigate case.

title: Wrong-context vessel screening guidance
text: Vessel or shipping-name overlap without matching IMO or country context should be treated as wrong-context and investigated further.

title: Alias plus identifier corroboration
text: Alias normalization plus exact passport identifier match can support a strong true positive individual screening result.
